summary: A single-story rectangular bunker-style building with a flat roof. The structure features a brick upper section, stone/sandstone middle walls with evenly-spaced window openings, and a dark stone foundation. The building sits on a concrete platform surrounded by dirt, with a white concrete border foundation visible on all sides.
elements: windows (5 evenly-spaced openings per long side)
rebuild_hints: Create concrete platform base with white border frame
Layer dark stonebrick for foundation (1-2 blocks high)
Add sandstone/light stone middle section (2-3 blocks high) with 5 window openings per long side, evenly spaced
Top with brick layer (1-2 blocks high)
Windows appear to be 1×1 or 1×2 openings with dark frames
Maintain symmetry along the length axis
uncertainties: Exact window dimensions and frame material (appears dark, possibly dark oak or spruce wood)
Precise height of each material layer (estimated from visual proportions)
Whether interior is hollow or filled
Whether roof has any interior structure or is solid
